titleStmt.title: SII 18.277: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 277. (B.K. No. 1 of 1933-34.) BAṄKĀPUR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar set up in the Government Cattle Breeding farm.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription refers itself to the reign of Harihara. It states that Harihara became king after the death of Bukka. Further it contains a description of Mādhava-mantri, a minister of Harihara and the governor of Male region. Harihara or Hariyaṇṇa son of Kampa-nṛipa who was a subordinate of Mādhava-mantri is praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastavastuvistīrnnapūrnnaghūrnnitārnnavāvrutavasu matīvaḷaya pra
kīrttivaraṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ madavadarinrupāḷamattamātaṁgakuṁbharthaḷanipāta
grakaṁṭhīravōpamānasahajasāhasārūḍhaṁ Arirāyavibhāḍaṁ viṣamavidviṣṭa
tāśanapracaṁḍadōrdaṁḍamaṁḍitamaṁḍalāgrabhīḷakāḷāhisaṁcaraṇatrāṇaṁ hi
ya suratāṇaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīvīrabukkadharādhīśvaraṁ pū
rvvadakṣiṇa paścimōdadhitrayāvadhiya sakaḷa vasudhāvaḷayamanēkatsatradiṁdāḷdu palaAfter this letter two letters
kālaṁ rājyaṁgeyiyuttamirddū . vṟu . nāḍe telaṁganaṁ nilisi pāṁḍyana daṁḍisi cōḷanaṁ bi
suḷtōḍisi cērakēraḷaranāraḍigoṁḍuṟe tuḷvarāyaraṁ ṟōḍisi kāḍi koṁkaṇana biṁkamanī
ḷkuḷigoṁḍu nirbhbhayaṁ māḍi nijāgñeyoḷu nilisidaṁ dhareyaṁ kali bukkabhūbhujaṁ . Ā
vīra bukkabhūpaṁ bhūvaḷeyādhīśa sukhadi taṇidiradamrutaśrīvadhukacagrahāgraha
bhāvaṁ sale muktipadamaneydida baḷikaṁ . tattanayaṁ pratāpatapanōjvaḷatējasa
mruddhiyiṁde durvrutta virōdhisaṁtamasamaṁ neleyi rade teraḷci peccidudyattaruṣaṁḍa The letter yi is written above the line.
ṭṭeḍegaḷadriguhāṁtaramalladelliyuṁ nittaramillenalhariharaṁ dhareyaṁ taḷedaṁ
bhujāgradoḷū . sakaḷadharādhipattya bha jasāha� śaucaguṇaṁ su
yukti triyaṁbakapadabhakti sadgurukaṭākṣanirīkṣaṇa bhūmidēvapālakaguṇa
mellavaṁ nerapi kaṁjasamudbava nirmmisiṭṭanī sukrutasuradru mamaṁ hariharēśana kīrttivaThe anusvāra was first engraved after
dhūsijēśanaṁ ... svasti śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvaraṁ kaliyugavīravikramāva tāraṁThe lettersrāja are written above the line.
namavinamitāny�kasuhrunmaṁḍaḷikamaṁḍaḷimagu ṭamaṇigaṇāḷaṁkaraṇa The letter gu is written above the line.
ki budhajanārtta vataraṇa śrī vīrahariharēśva
ṁgeyiThe following few

Ā vīrahariharana padasēvāsaṁpadame jīvanōpāyavenalu bhūvinuta mādhavāṁ
kacamūvallabhanāḷutiralu sale nele maleyaṁ . sivapadabhaktiyoḷgurupadāṁbujasē
veyoḷudghaśauryyadiṁ vividhakaḷāvivagñateyoḷaṁ sale bhūsurapālakatvadiṁ pravi
ditaduṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭasurakṣaṇavrittiyiṁda mādhavavaramaṁtrimukhya maleyaṁ sa
leyāḷdananēkavatsaraṁ ... svasti malerājarāja malaparo ḷugaṁḍa kadana pracaṁḍa duṣṭa maṁThe space for the letterro is left unengraved.
trigōdhūmaghanagharaṭṭa koṁkaṇarāyadiśāpaṭṭanenipa mādhavāṁkacamūpaṁ koṁkaṇa
dēśaghaṭṭāvaḷiyādiyāda koṁbēḷu maleyaṁ peṁṇnuḍe Uḍisi nijāgñeyoḷu nili
si sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyiyuttamire . kaṁ . Ā mādhavamaṁtri padatāmarasāmōdamattama
dhukaranenipaṁ bhīmabaḷaṁ saviḷāsōddāmaṁ mādana kulōdbhavaṁ kaṁpanrupaṁ . tadapatyara nēkaroḷaṁ
viditayaśaṁ śauriya dharyyasāmarthyayutaṁ sadamaḷamādhavamaṁtripadapadmōnmatta bhruṁgaha
riharanesedaṁ . Urutarakīrttivallarīpaṁvēṣṭita saṁdrudtamūlamudghasauṁdara suma
nōbhiraṁjanasadāphaḷadāyakavrittiyiṁde saṁcarasurabhūjadhāruṇiyoḷudbhava
māye (yte) nutaḷkaṟiṁde bēḷparu pugarppaguṇya hariyaṁṇana janatāśaraṁṇyana . ĀThe record stops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 18.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
